name: io.github.Servosity/rewst-mcp
title: Rewst MCP
description: Operate and monitor Rewst RPA across every client org: automation health, failures, ROI, and drift.

environmentVariables.name: REWST_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Rewst API base URL for your region (default https://api.rewst.io; set for EU/AU).

environmentVariables.name: REWST_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Rewst API token from an API client you create in the console (sent as a bearer token).
